customManagers.description: Keep the plugin-docgen version pinned in the release workflow (go install ...@vX.Y.Z) up to date.

packageRules.description: Single Go module, no commit scope, matching the existing deps: convention this repo's svu/git-cliff release flow expects.
Group all Go module updates into one PR so simultaneous go.mod/go.sum bumps don't conflict. The plugin-docgen pin (custom.regex, a workflow file) stays its own PR.
